customDetailFormulas.calculatedFormula: IF( (WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate))) = 1, text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) - 6) & " - " & text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) + 0), IF( (WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate))) = 2, text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) - 0) & " - " & text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) + 6), IF( (WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate))) = 3, text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) - 1) & " - " & text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) + 5), IF( (WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate))) = 4, text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) - 2) & " - " & text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) + 4), IF( (WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate))) = 5, text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) - 3) & " - " & text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) + 3), IF( (WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate))) = 6, text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) - 4) & " - " & text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) + 2), IF( (WEEKDAY(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate))) = 7, text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) - 5) & " - " & text(DATEVALUE(sirenum__Shift_Invitation__c.CreatedDate) + 1), "NA")))))))
customDetailFormulas.label: Mon-Sun Week

Report.description: Number of shifts each allocator has broadcasted broken down by week

criteriaItems.value: Alliance Nursing - Adelaide,Alliance Nursing - Perth,Alliance Extra Staff - Adelaide,Alliance Extra Staff - Albury

Report.name: SA/WA Monthly Broadcast Report
